title: Crypto

8.name: Hardcoded Plaintext Password
8.vuln: Can gain access by reading source code.

13.name: Weak encryption/hashing
13.vuln: Unsalted MD5 hashes are easily reversible.

27.name: RCE via eval()
27.vuln: eval() executes arbitrary input as code, allowing full system compromise.

title: Deserializer

15.name: Prototype Pollution
15.vuln: Using lodash.merge with unsanitized user input allows an attacker to inject properties like '__proto__.role' into the global Object prototype, elevating privileges for all objects.

18.name: Path Traversal (LFI)
18.vuln: The theme parameter is used in a file path without sanitization. An attacker can use '../' sequences to read sensitive system files like /etc/passwd.

29.name: Blind OS Command Injection
29.vuln: The callback variable is concatenated directly into a shell command string. An attacker can use shell metacharacters like ';' or '&&' to execute arbitrary OS commands.
